sources.$comment: MS-OI29500 is ingested from Microsoft Learn's native markdown endpoint (`?accept=text/markdown`) per Phase 0 evaluation. The pinned PDF URL is for citation/provenance; not parsed. version = published revision ID; edition = revision date.
